---
title: "About"
---

## What is this?

This is a crowd-sourced map of places that serve **fountain Diet Coke** in the broad Santa Barbara area.

## How does it work?

- Anyone can submit a location using the [submission form](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSep4UoqOil2V5x9Mxi1cqu_rlowAbNfmzpCryh0ZZQ1L4LlyQ/viewform){target="_blank"}
- Submissions are reviewed and added to the map
- **Verified** locations have been confirmed by a visitor to actually have fountain Diet Coke
- **Unverified** locations have been submitted but not yet confirmed

## How can I help?

- **Submit a location** you know serves fountain Diet Coke
- **Verify a location** — if you visit a spot on the map, let us know if it checks out!

## Contact

Have questions or feedback? Email us at [fountaindcsb@gmail.com](mailto:fountaindcsb@gmail.com) or [open an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/traceymangin/fountain-dc-sb/issues).
